heading: Grant programs
label: 1727b Grant programs
text: To carry out the policies and accomplish the objectives described in , the Administrator may negotiate and execute agreements with least developed countries to provide commodities to such countries on a grant basis either through the Commodity Credit Corporation or through private trade channels.section 1691 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 303 of , , which enacted , was renumbered section 310 by , , .act July 10, 1954, ch. 469, title III68 Stat. 459section 1692 of this titlePub. L. 95–88, title II, § 211(a)(1)91 Stat. 548Aug. 3, 1977

Amendments1990— amended section generally, substituting present provisions for provisions relating to a multiyear utilization proposal regarding value and amount of commodities proposed to be distributed, integration with other forms of development assistance, and non-replacement of other programs.Pub. L. 101–6241979—Subsec. (a). struck out “for each year such funds are to be disbursed” after “on an annual basis”.Pub. L. 96–53
